scope: paired K=8 dev-only oracle decomposition; no training, checkpoint selection, stress, formal validation, or test
oracle_scope: evaluation-only return probes; metadata is used only after a frozen normal M1f forward and is never exposed to PFC, EC, context inference, training, or checkpoint selection
historical_context_oracle: at each return probe, replay the frozen M1f context emitted at the matching pass-1 query in the correct or wrong reference segment
exact_address_oracle: at each return probe, replay the full frozen conjunctive address emitted at the matching pass-1 query in the correct reference segment; all other addresses remain normal

classification_rule.CONTEXT_IDENTITY_RETRIEVAL_DOMINANT: correct-context absolute, gain, and directionality gates pass
classification_rule.PFC_HPC_FUSION_DOMINANT: exact-address raw-HPC ceiling passes but fused ceiling fails
classification_rule.ADDRESS_RECONSTRUCTION_DOMINANT: exact-address raw and fused ceilings pass, but correct-context recovery fails
classification_rule.MIXED_OR_UNRESOLVED: none of the frozen exclusive diagnoses applies

post_result_rule: do not change conditions, seeds, episodes, thresholds, or classification after reading results
